subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Primal Point unto one of the servants of God, that he may be drawn unto the melodies of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدن نقطه الاولی الی احد من عباد الله لیستجذب من نغمات الله
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God
